title: November 19
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 19''' is the 323rd day of the year (324th in leap years), with 42 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Terrence Carson]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] is re-released.
*[[1982]] – [[Will Sliney]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Adam Driver]] is born.
*[[1996]] – "[[Prophecies and Destinies]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1997]] – ''[[Shadow Stalker]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 9]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2003 – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]].
*[[2006]] – [[Wikipedia:Wii|Wii]] released.
*[[2008]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 35|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 35]] published.
*2008 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Departure]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*2008 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (mobile)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' mobile game]] released.
*[[2010]] – "[[Heroes on Both Sides]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[2015]] – [[Geno Studio]] founded.
*[[2016]] – "[[Iron Squadron (episode)|Iron Squadron]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2019]] – [[Tom Lyle]] dies.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 12: Rebels and Rogues]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Force Collector]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Menace Revealed Vol. 2]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[The Art of Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars: Tales from the Galaxy's Edge]]'' released.
*2020 – [[Adam Leadbeater]] dies.
*[[2021]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Castaways]]'' released.
*[[2022]] – [[Greg Bear]] dies.
*[[2024]] – ''[[The Living Force]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia: The Comprehensive Guide to the Star Wars Galaxy]]'' published in the US.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Phase III Vol. 2 – The Hunted]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Jedi Knights 9|''Jedi Knights'' 9]] published.
<noinclude>
